Description: In this opening session, facilitator Mindy Price will set the tone for Supervisor Summit 2026 by building on past themes while introducing this year’s focus on Bringing the Weather. Participants will reflect on how supervisors shape the climate of their teams through tone, energy, mindset, and leadership presence.

SessionTitle: Bringing the Weather: Setting the Tone for Leadership
Description: In this session, the City Manager will reinforce the summit’s theme of Supervisors Bringing the Weather, emphasizing the vital role supervisors play in setting the tone, shaping team culture, and influencing performance. Participants will be challenged to model accountability, positivity, and leadership that drives operational excellence.

This session will cover key employee and labor law topics that impact supervisors, including practical guidance for handling workplace issues, policy considerations, and common legal risks. Participants will also have the opportunity to ask questions and gain insight directly from the City’s labor attorney.
Short break for participants to reset, connect, and prepare for the next session.

This training session focuses on practical leadership strategies supervisors can apply immediately, including communication, accountability, team expectations, and creating a positive workplace culture that supports performance and engagement.
Lunch break for participants to recharge, connect with peers, and reflect on the morning sessions before continuing the afternoon learning experience.

This afternoon session builds on the morning discussions by exploring leadership habits, coaching conversations, and the importance of consistency in how supervisors lead, support, and develop their teams.
Short break for participants to reset, network, and prepare for the final training session of Day 1.

This final training block challenges supervisors to connect the day’s lessons to their own leadership approach, focusing on ownership, intentional leadership, and sustaining a strong team climate beyond the summit.
Closing remarks to wrap up Day 1 and outline expectations and key focus areas for Days 2 and 3 of the Supervisor Summit.
